### Areas in UTC+02:00 longitudes using other time zones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B02:00&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Areas in UTC+02:00 longitudes using other time zones")]

Using [UTC+03:00](/wiki/UTC%2B03:00 "UTC+03:00"):

* Tanzania
  + The western part, including [Mwanza](/wiki/Mwanza "Mwanza") and [Mbeya](/wiki/Mbeya "Mbeya")
* Uganda
* Kenya
  + The western part, including nation's capital [Nairobi](/wiki/Nairobi "Nairobi")
* Ethiopia
  + The western part, including [Nekemte](/wiki/Nekemte "Nekemte") and [Jimma](/wiki/Jimma "Jimma")
* Saudi Arabia
  + The northwesternmost part, including [Tabuk](/wiki/Tabuk,_Saudi_Arabia "Tabuk, Saudi Arabia")
* Turkey
  + Most part in the country, including [Istanbul](/wiki/Istanbul "Istanbul")
* Ukraine
  + Part of Donetsk and Luhansk regions, Crimea
* Belarus
* Russia
  + The western part, including [Saint Petersburg](/wiki/Saint_Petersburg "Saint Petersburg"), half of Moscow

Using [UTC+01:00](/wiki/UTC%2B01:00 "UTC+01:00"):

* North Macedonia (standard time)
  + The easternmost part, including [Novo Selo](/wiki/Novo_Selo,_Novo_Selo "Novo Selo, Novo Selo") and [Berovo](/wiki/Berovo "Berovo")
* Serbia (standard time)
  + The very easternmost part, including [Pirot](/wiki/Pirot "Pirot")

  + The northeasternmost part of [Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg](/wiki/Szabolcs-Szatm%C3%A1r-Bereg "Szabolcs-Szatmár-Bereg")
* Slovakia (standard time)
  + The easternmost part of [Prešov Region](/wiki/Pre%C5%A1ov_Region "Prešov Region")
* Poland (standard time)
  + The easternmost part, including [Białystok](/wiki/Bia%C5%82ystok "Białystok")
* Norway (standard time)
  + Most part of [Finnmark](/wiki/Finnmark "Finnmark")
  + The easternmost part of [Svalbard](/wiki/Svalbard "Svalbard")
* Chad
  + The westernmost part of [Ennedi-Est](/wiki/Ennedi-Est_(region) "Ennedi-Est (region)"), including [Amdjarass](/wiki/Amdjarass_(city) "Amdjarass (city)")
* Democratic Republic of the Congo
  + The easternmost part of its provinces:
    - [Nord-Ubangi](/wiki/Nord-Ubangi "Nord-Ubangi")

### Areas outside UTC+02:00 longitudes using UTC+02:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B02:00&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+02:00 longitudes using UTC+02:00 time")]

#### Areas between 7°30' E and 22°30' E ("physical" UTC+01:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B02:00&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Areas between 7°30' E and 22°30' E (\"physical\" UTC+01:00)")]

From south to north:

* South Africa
  + The westernmost part, including [Cape Town](/wiki/Cape_Town "Cape Town")
* Botswana
  + The western part of the districts:
    - [Kgalagadi](/wiki/Kgalagadi_District "Kgalagadi District")
    - [Ghanzi](/wiki/Ghanzi_District "Ghanzi District")
    - [Ngamiland](/wiki/North-West_District_(Botswana) "North-West District (Botswana)")
* Democratic Republic of the Congo
  + The very westernmost part of [Lualaba Province](/wiki/Lualaba_Province "Lualaba Province"), [Kasaï-Central](/wiki/Kasa%C3%AF-Central "Kasaï-Central") and [Sankuru](/wiki/Sankuru "Sankuru")
* Libya
  + The most part in the country, where the nation's capital [Tripoli](/wiki/Tripoli,_Libya "Tripoli, Libya") is
* Greece (standard time)
  + The western part, including [Patras](/wiki/Patras "Patras") and [Ioanina](/wiki/Ioannina "Ioannina")
* Romania (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Timişoara](/wiki/Timi%C8%99oara "Timișoara")
* Russia
  + [Kaliningrad Oblast](/wiki/Kaliningrad_Oblast "Kaliningrad Oblast")
* Lithuania (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Klaipėda](/wiki/Klaip%C4%97da "Klaipėda")
* Latvia (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Liepāja](/wiki/Liep%C4%81ja "Liepāja")
* Estonia (standard time)
  + The westernmost parts of the [Saare](/wiki/Saare_County "Saare County") and [Hiiu](/wiki/Hiiu_County "Hiiu County") counties.
* Finland (standard time)
  + The westernmost part, including [Turku](/wiki/Turku "Turku")
